general.name: mos_target_gaia_dr3_astrophysical_parameters
general.description: The Gaia DR3 astrophysical parameters table contains the astrophysical parameters derived for sources in Gaia DR3. This is the main table containing the 1D astrophysical parameters produced by the Apsis processing chain developed in Gaia DPAC CU8. For more details refer to https://gea.esac.esa.int/archive/documentation/GDR3/Gaia_archive/chap_datamodel/sec_dm_astrophysical_parameter_tables/ssec_dm_astrophysical_parameters.html.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_gaia_dr3_astrophysical_parameters-[NUM].[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits', V_TARG='2.0.0', and NUM=1..34 for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

source_id.name: source_id
source_id.description: Source Identifier in the dr20_gaia_dr3_source table (source_id column)

classprob_dsc_combmod_quasar.name: classprob_dsc_combmod_quasar
classprob_dsc_combmod_quasar.description: Probability from DSC-Combmod of being a quasar (data used: BP/RP spectrum, photometry, astrometry)

classprob_dsc_combmod_galaxy.name: classprob_dsc_combmod_galaxy
classprob_dsc_combmod_galaxy.description: Probability from DSC-Combmod of being a galaxy (data used: BP/RP spectrum, photometry, astrometry)

classprob_dsc_combmod_star.name: classprob_dsc_combmod_star
classprob_dsc_combmod_star.description: Probability from DSC-Combmod of being a single star (but not a white dwarf) (data used: BP/RP spectrum, photometry, astrometry)
